channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Fans react to Nate Jacobs’ death in latest Euphoria episode
item.description: The penultimate episode of the third season of Euphoria has sparked intense reactions from viewers following the unexpected death of Nate Jacobs, played by Jacob Elordi. After a four-year hiatus, the ...

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes Photos Highlight the Making of Léon: The Professional and the Early Career of Natalie Portman
item.description: The article from Vintage Everyday revisits the production of the 1994 cult classic “Léon: The Professional” through a collection of behind-the-scenes photographs featuring actors Jean Reno and Natalie...

item.title: Rising internal debate over CCM succession ahead of 2030 elections
item.description: Barely months after the 2025 General Election, internal political discussions within Tanzania’s ruling party CCM are already increasingly focusing on the 2030 presidential succession. Reports indicate...

item.title: Trump criticizes GOP senators and congressman amid internal party tensions over Iran negotiations
item.description: President Donald Trump sparked controversy after posting a lengthy early-morning message on Truth Social in which he directly attacked several Republican lawmakers who have criticized his approach to ...

item.title: Historic 1945 Photograph Captures Jewish Mother and Daughter After Liberation From Bergen-Belsen Evacuation Train
item.description: The article recounts the story behind a famous World War II photograph taken during the final days of Nazi Germany in April 1945. As Allied forces advanced across Germany, the SS attempted to evacuate...

item.title: Coalition scrutinises rapid approval process in Ben Roberts-Smith prosecution
item.description: The Coalition has questioned the speed at which Attorney-General Michelle Rowland approved criminal charges against former Victoria Cross recipient Ben Roberts-Smith, following revelations during a Se...

item.title: Megyn Kelly Faces Backlash After Discussing Allegations About Trump’s Marriages on Podcast
item.description: Political commentator Megyn Kelly drew widespread criticism and debate after making controversial remarks about Donald Trump’s personal life during an appearance on the Hodgetwins Podcast. In the disc...

item.title: Fashion Photography of Arik Népo in the Early 1950s
item.description: Arik Népo (1913–1961) was a highly influential fashion and portrait photographer whose work helped shape the visual identity of mid-20th century fashion imagery. Born in Moscow, he later became active...

item.title: Congress high command to decide Karnataka leadership issue within 2–3 days after meetings with Siddaramaiah and party leaders
item.description: The Congress party’s central leadership is expected to take a decision within the next two to three days regarding the ongoing speculation over a possible leadership change in Karnataka. The developme...

item.title: Experts clarify perimenopause symptoms and contraception guidance amid online misinformation
item.description: The article addresses growing concerns among healthcare professionals about the spread of misleading information on social media regarding perimenopause and contraception. Experts warn that online con...

item.title: Durban metro police conduct enforcement operation targeting undocumented foreign nationals in CBD
item.description: Metro police in Durban conducted an enforcement operation in the central business district (CBD) on Monday morning, focusing on undocumented foreign nationals allegedly operating illegally in the area...

item.title: Demolition drive targets alleged illegal constructions linked to TMC in West Bengal amid political row
item.description: A fresh demolition drive was carried out in West Bengal’s Hooghly district, where civic authorities used bulldozers to remove alleged illegal structures reportedly linked to leaders of the Trinamool C...

item.title: 8-year-old discovers 1,700-year-old Roman statuette fragment in Israel’s Negev Desert
item.description: An 8-year-old boy visiting southern Israel made an unexpected archaeological discovery when he found a small Roman-era statuette fragment during a family trip to the Ramon Crater in the Negev Desert. ...

item.title: Foote backs squad rotation and continued intensity ahead of Junior Boks clash with Fiji
item.description: Junior Springboks coach Kevin Foote says the team will continue to play with intensity and discipline when they face Fiji in their second match of the U20 International Series in Cape Town. This follo...

item.title: MARINA launches 2-week maritime service contracting program offering ferry fare subsidies nationwide
item.description: The Maritime Industry Authority (MARINA) under the Department of Transportation (DOTr) has officially launched a nationwide Service Contracting Program for the maritime sector aimed at providing fare ...

item.title: WHO reports 220 suspected Ebola deaths as outbreak spreads in DRC and Uganda
item.description: The World Health Organisation (WHO) has reported a serious escalation in the ongoing Ebola outbreak in Central Africa, with its Director-General Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus confirming that there have b...

item.title: Toshifumi Suzuki, architect of Japan’s 7-Eleven convenience store empire, dies at 93
item.description: Toshifumi Suzuki, the influential Japanese businessman widely credited with transforming 7-Eleven into a global convenience store powerhouse, has died at the age of 93. He passed away on May 18 from h...

item.title: Privacy-Focused Gay Dating Apps Launch as Alternatives to Grindr Amid User Backlash
item.description: As concerns grow over data privacy, monetization tactics, and bot infiltration on mainstream gay dating platforms like Grindr, several new apps are positioning themselves as community-driven alternati...

item.title: Kenya High Commission collaborates with Australian authorities in investigation into death of Kenyan national Sheila Chebii
item.description: The Kenya High Commission in Canberra has confirmed that it is actively working together with Australian authorities to investigate the death of Kenyan national Sheila Chebii, who passed away in Sydne...

item.title: Prince Harry Reflects on Regrets Over His Early Army and Eton Years, According to Royal Commentators
item.description: A recent Channel 5 documentary, 'Prince Harry In Therapy', has prompted discussion among royal commentators about the Duke of Sussex’s reflections on his past. According to experts featured in the pro...
